assertions.query: SELECT bool_and(v1 and v2) FROM t1;
SELECT bool_and(v1 and v2) FROM t1 where v1 and v2;
SELECT bool_and(v1) FROM t1 where pk > 10;
SELECT bool_or(v1), bool_or(v2) FROM t1 where pk <> 2;
SELECT bool_or(v1 and v2) FROM t1;
SELECT bool_or(v1) FROM t1 where pk > 10;
SELECT array_agg(name ORDER BY age ASC) FROM test_data;
SELECT array_agg(name ORDER BY age DESC) FROM test_data;
SELECT array_agg(id ORDER BY age) FROM test_data;
SELECT array_agg(name ORDER BY score DESC) FROM test_data;
SELECT array_agg(name ORDER BY created_at ASC) FROM test_data;
SELECT array_agg(age ORDER BY name) FROM test_data;
SELECT array_agg(name ORDER BY category ASC, age DESC) FROM test_data;
SELECT array_agg(id ORDER BY category ASC, score DESC) FROM test_data;
SELECT array_agg(name ORDER BY age * 2) FROM test_data;
SELECT array_agg(age ORDER BY category || name) FROM test_data;
SELECT array_agg(name ORDER BY CASE WHEN age > 27 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, age) FROM test_data;
SELECT array_agg(name ORDER BY nullable_field) FROM test_data;
SELECT category, array_agg(name ORDER BY age) FROM test_data GROUP BY category ORDER BY category;
SELECT category, array_agg(name ORDER BY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data t2 WHERE t2.category = test_data.category AND t2.age < test_data.age)) FROM test_data GROUP BY category ORDER BY category;
SELECT array_agg(name ORDER BY COALESCE(nullable_field, 'zzz')) FROM test_data;
SELECT array_agg(name ORDER BY LENGTH(name) DESC, name ASC) FROM test_data;
SELECT category, array_agg(name ORDER BY score - (SELECT AVG(score) FROM test_data t2 WHERE t2.category = test_data.category)) FROM test_data GROUP BY category ORDER BY category;
SELECT array_agg(name ORDER BY EXTRACT(hour FROM created_at)) FROM test_data;
SELECT array_agg(name ORDER BY age) FROM test_data WHERE age > 100;
SELECT array_agg(name ORDER BY age > 27, age) FROM test_data;
SELECT array_agg(CASE WHEN v1 > 20 THEN v1 ELSE NULL END) FROM t1;
SELECT array_agg(CASE WHEN v1 >= 20 THEN v2 ELSE NULL END) FROM t2;
SELECT array_agg(CASE WHEN v1 > 20 THEN v1::text ELSE v2 END) FROM t2;
SELECT array_agg(CASE WHEN v1 > 20 THEN v1 ELSE v2 END) FROM t2;
SELECT json_agg(v ORDER BY v DESC) FROM json_items WHERE v IS NOT NULL;
SELECT json_agg(DISTINCT v) FROM (VALUES (1), (1), (2)) AS vals(v);
SELECT jsonb_agg(j ORDER BY pk) FROM json_items;
SELECT jsonb_agg(DISTINCT v) FROM (VALUES (1), (1), (2)) AS vals(v);
SELECT json_object_agg(k, v ORDER BY pk) FROM json_items WHERE v IS NOT NULL;
SELECT jsonb_object_agg(k, v ORDER BY pk) FROM json_items;
SELECT json_agg(v) FROM json_items WHERE false;
SELECT cbrt(v1), cbrt(v2), cbrt(v3) FROM test ORDER BY pk;
SELECT round(cbrt(v1)::numeric, 10), round(cbrt(v2)::numeric, 10), round(cbrt(v3)::numeric, 10) FROM test ORDER BY pk;
SELECT cbrt(v4) FROM test ORDER BY pk;
SELECT gcd(v1, 10), gcd(v2, 20) FROM test ORDER BY pk;
SELECT gcd(v3, 10) FROM test ORDER BY pk;
SELECT gcd(v4, 10) FROM test ORDER BY pk;
SELECT lcm(v1, 10), lcm(v2, 20) FROM test ORDER BY pk;
SELECT lcm(v3, 10) FROM test ORDER BY pk;
SELECT lcm(v4, 10) FROM test ORDER BY pk;
SELECT hashtext(''), hashtext('electric_slot_default'), hashtext('abc'), hashtext('ümlaut'), hashtext(NULL::text);

SELECT hashtextextended('', 0), hashtextextended('electric_slot_default', 0), hashtextextended('abc', 0), hashtextextended('ümlaut', 0), hashtextextended(NULL::text, 0), hashtextextended(NULL::text, 1);

SELECT v, (hashtext(v)::int8 & 4294967295) = (hashtextextended(v, 0) & 4294967295) AS matches
                            FROM (VALUES (''::text), ('PostgreSQL'), ('eIpUEtqmY89'), ('AXKEJBTK'), ('muop28x03'), ('yi3nm0d73'), ('ümlaut'), ('abc')) x(v);
SELECT hashtextextended('PostgreSQL', 1), hashtextextended('PostgreSQL', 1) = hashtextextended('PostgreSQL', 0) AS same;
SELECT hashtextextended('a', 0), hashtextextended('ab', 0), hashtextextended('abcd', 0), hashtextextended('abcdefghijkl', 0), hashtextextended('abcdefghijklm', 0);
SELECT pg_column_size(NULL::text), pg_column_size('abc'::text), pg_column_size(1::int2), pg_column_size(1::int4), pg_column_size(1::int8), pg_column_size(true);
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(pg_column_size(id), 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(pg_column_size(label), 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(pg_column_size(active), 0)), 0)::bigint FROM colsize_items;

expectedRows.value: PostgreSQL 16.13 on aarch64-unknown-linux-musl, compiled by gcc (Alpine 15.2.0) 15.2.0, 64-bit

assertions.query: COMMENT ON COLUMN test_table.id IS 'This is col id';
COMMENT ON TABLESPACE tblspc_2 IS 'Store a few of the things';
SELECT pg_get_constraintdef(oid) FROM pg_catalog.pg_constraint WHERE conrelid='testing'::regclass;
SELECT pg_get_constraintdef(oid) FROM pg_catalog.pg_constraint WHERE conrelid='testing2'::regclass;
SELECT pg_get_constraintdef(oid) FROM pg_catalog.pg_constraint WHERE conrelid='testing3'::regclass;
SELECT pg_get_constraintdef(oid, true) FROM pg_catalog.pg_constraint WHERE conrelid='testing3'::regclass;
SELECT pg_get_constraintdef(oid, false) FROM pg_catalog.pg_constraint WHERE conrelid='testing3'::regclass;
SELECT pg_get_expr(adbin, adrelid) FROM pg_catalog.pg_attrdef WHERE adrelid = 'temperature'::regclass;
SELECT indexrelid, pg_get_expr(indpred, indrelid) FROM pg_catalog.pg_index WHERE indrelid='testing'::regclass;
SELECT indexrelid, pg_get_expr(indpred, indrelid, true) FROM pg_catalog.pg_index WHERE indrelid='testing'::regclass;
SELECT indexrelid, pg_get_expr(indpred, indrelid, NULL) FROM pg_catalog.pg_index WHERE indrelid='testing'::regclass;
SELECT json_build_object(k, v) FROM (SELECT 'a' || chr(10) || 'b' AS k, 'c' || chr(92) || 'd' AS v) q;
SELECT * FROM json_to_record('{"a":1,"b":"foo","j":{"x":2}}'::json) AS r(a int, b text, j json);
SELECT row_to_json(r) FROM (SELECT 1 AS id, 'foo' AS label, NULL::text AS note) AS r;
SELECT '123' IS JSON, '"abc"' IS JSON SCALAR, '{"a":"b"}' IS JSON OBJECT, '[1,2]' IS JSON ARRAY, 'abc' IS JSON;
SELECT '123' IS JSON VALUE, '"abc"' IS JSON VALUE, '{"a":1}' IS JSON VALUE, '[1]' IS JSON VALUE;
SELECT '{}' IS NOT JSON ARRAY, '[]' IS NOT JSON OBJECT, 'abc' IS NOT JSON, NULL::text IS JSON, NULL::text IS NOT JSON;
SELECT '{"a":1,"a":2}' IS JSON WITH UNIQUE KEYS, '{"a":1,"a":2}' IS JSON WITHOUT UNIQUE KEYS;
SELECT '[{"a":"1"},{"b":"2","b":"3"}]' IS JSON ARRAY WITH UNIQUE KEYS, '[{"a":"1"},{"b":"2","b":"3"}]' IS JSON ARRAY WITHOUT UNIQUE KEYS;
SELECT '{"a":1,"a":2}'::json IS JSON WITH UNIQUE KEYS, '{"a":1,"a":2}'::jsonb IS JSON WITH UNIQUE KEYS;
SELECT to_jsonb(r)->>'id', to_jsonb(r)->>'label' FROM jsonb_record_items AS r;
SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_record('{"a":1,"b":"foo","c":null,"j":{"x":2}}'::jsonb) AS r(a int, b text, c bool, j jsonb);
SELECT r.b FROM jsonb_to_record('{"a":1,"b":"foo"}'::jsonb) AS r(a int, b text);
SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset('[{"a":1,"b":"foo","c":true},{"a":2,"b":"bar"}]'::jsonb) AS r(a int, b text, c bool) ORDER BY a;
SELECT jsonb_set_lax('{"a":1,"b":2}'::jsonb, '{b}', NULL::jsonb), jsonb_set_lax('{"a":1,"b":2}'::jsonb, '{d}', NULL::jsonb, true);

SELECT jsonb_set_lax('{"a":1,"b":2}'::jsonb, '{b}', NULL::jsonb, true, 'return_target'), jsonb_set_lax('{"a":1,"b":2}'::jsonb, '{b}', NULL::jsonb, true, 'delete_key'), jsonb_set_lax('{"a":1,"b":2}'::jsonb, '{b}', NULL::jsonb, true, 'use_json_null');

SELECT jsonb_set_lax(NULL::jsonb, '{b}', NULL::jsonb) IS NULL, jsonb_set_lax('{"a":1}'::jsonb, NULL::text[], NULL::jsonb) IS NULL, jsonb_set_lax('{"a":1}'::jsonb, '{a}', NULL::jsonb, NULL::boolean) IS NULL;
SELECT pk, jsonb_array_length(doc->'items'), json_array_length(raw->'items') FROM json_shapes ORDER BY pk;
SELECT s.pk, e.value FROM json_shapes s JOIN LATERAL (SELECT * FROM jsonb_each(s.doc)) AS e ON true WHERE e.key = 'a' ORDER BY s.pk;
SELECT s.pk, e.value FROM json_shapes s JOIN LATERAL jsonb_each(s.doc) AS e ON true WHERE e.key = 'a' ORDER BY s.pk;
SELECT s.pk, key FROM json_shapes s JOIN LATERAL jsonb_object_keys(s.doc) AS key ON true ORDER BY s.pk, key;
SELECT s.pk, key FROM json_shapes s, jsonb_object_keys(s.doc) AS key ORDER BY s.pk, key;
SELECT s.pk, e.jsonb_array_elements FROM json_shapes s JOIN LATERAL (SELECT * FROM jsonb_array_elements(s.doc->'items')) AS e ON true ORDER BY s.pk, e.jsonb_array_elements;
SELECT s.pk, e.jsonb_array_elements FROM json_shapes s JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(s.doc->'items') AS e ON true ORDER BY s.pk, e.jsonb_array_elements;
SELECT s.pk, elem FROM json_shapes s JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(s.doc->'items') AS elem ON true ORDER BY s.pk, elem;
SELECT DISTINCT elem FROM json_shapes s JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(s.doc->'items') AS elem ON true ORDER BY elem;
SELECT DISTINCT jsonb_array_elements(doc->'items') FROM json_shapes ORDER BY jsonb_array_elements;
SELECT s.pk, e.json_array_elements FROM json_shapes s JOIN LATERAL (SELECT * FROM json_array_elements(s.raw->'items')) AS e ON true ORDER BY s.pk, e.json_array_elements;
SELECT s.pk, e.json_array_elements FROM json_shapes s JOIN LATERAL json_array_elements(s.raw->'items') AS e ON true ORDER BY s.pk, e.json_array_elements;
SELECT DISTINCT elem FROM json_shapes s JOIN LATERAL json_array_elements(s.raw->'items') AS elem ON true ORDER BY elem;
SELECT DISTINCT elem FROM json_shapes s JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements_text(s.doc->'items') AS elem ON true ORDER BY elem;
SELECT length(doc->>'payload') FROM json_shapes WHERE pk = 2;
UPDATE json_shapes SET doc = jsonb_set(doc, '{items,1}', '9'::jsonb) WHERE pk = 1;
SELECT doc->'items' FROM json_shapes WHERE pk = 1;
SELECT unnest(val1) FROM testing WHERE id=1;
SELECT unnest(val1) FROM testing WHERE id=2;
SELECT unnest(val1) FROM testing WHERE id=3;

SELECT c.oid, c.relname AS table_name, n.nspname AS table_schema FROM pg_catalog.pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace WHERE (n.nspname='myschema' OR n.nspname='testschema') AND left(relname, 5) <> 'dolt_' order by relname;
SELECT t.oid, t.typname, n.nspname FROM pg_catalog.pg_type t JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = t.typnamespace WHERE n.nspname='myschema' OR n.nspname='testschema' ORDER BY t.typname;
SELECT pg_encoding_to_char(encoding) FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'postgres';
SELECT pg_get_userbyid(oid) FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname = 'catalog_user'

SELECT c.oid, c.relname AS table_name, n.nspname AS table_schema FROM pg_catalog.pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace WHERE (n.nspname='myschema' OR n.nspname='public') and left(relname, 5) <> 'dolt_';

assertions.query: SELECT EXTRACT(DAY FROM INTERVAL '40 days 1 minute');
SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM INTERVAL '5 days 3 hours');
select extract(epoch from interval '10 months 10 seconds');
select extract(hours from interval '10 months 65 minutes 10 seconds');
select extract(microsecond from interval '10 months 65 minutes 10 seconds');
select extract(millenniums from interval '3000 years 65 minutes 10 seconds');
select extract(millisecond from interval '10 months 65 minutes 10 seconds');
select extract(minutes from interval '10 months 65 minutes 10 seconds');
SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM INTERVAL '2 years 3 months');
SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM INTERVAL '2 years 13 months');
select extract(months from interval '20 months 65 minutes 10 seconds');
select extract(quarter from interval '20 months 65 minutes 10 seconds');
select extract(seconds from interval '65 minutes 10 seconds 5 millisecond');
select extract(years from interval '20 months 65 minutes 10 seconds');
select timezone(interval '2 minutes', timestamp with time zone '2001-02-16 20:38:40.12-05');
select timezone('UTC', timestamp with time zone '2001-02-16 20:38:40.12-05');
select timezone('-04:45', time with time zone '20:38:40.12-05');
select timezone(interval '2 hours 2 minutes', time with time zone '20:38:40.12-05');
select round(extract(epoch from '2024-08-22 13:47:57-07' at time zone 'UTC')) as startup_time;
select date_part('minute', time without time zone '20:38:40');
select date_part('second', time with time zone '20:38:40 UTC');
select date_part('year', timestamp without time zone '2001-02-16 20:38:40');
select date_part('day', timestamp with time zone '2001-02-16 20:38:40 UTC');
select date_trunc('day', timestamp with time zone '2001-02-16 20:38:40 UTC');
select date_trunc('day', timestamp with time zone '2001-02-16 20:38:40 UTC', '-07:00');
select date_trunc('hour', interval '2 days 10 hours 30 minutes');
SELECT to_timestamp('My birthday-> Year: 1976, Month: May, Day: 16', '"My birthday-> Year:" YYYY, "Month:" FMMonth, "Day:" DD');

SELECT to_timestamp('15 "text between quote marks" 98 54 45',
				  E'HH24 "\\"text between quote marks\\"" YY MI SS');
SELECT to_timestamp('1997 AD 11 16', 'YYYY BC MM DD');
SELECT to_timestamp('1997 BC 11 16', 'YYYY BC MM DD');
SELECT to_timestamp('1997 A.D. 11 16', 'YYYY B.C. MM DD');
SELECT to_timestamp('1997 B.C. 11 16', 'YYYY B.C. MM DD');

SELECT to_char(timestamp '2021-09-15 21:43:56.123456789', 'HH HH12 HH24 hh hh12 hh24 H h hH Hh');
SELECT to_char(timestamp '2021-09-15 21:43:56.123456789', 'SS ss S s MS ms Ms mS US us Us uS');
SELECT to_char(timestamp '2021-09-15 21:43:56.123456789', 'Y,YYY y,yyy YYYY yyyy YYY yyy YY yy Y y');
SELECT to_char(timestamp '2021-09-15 21:43:56.123456789', 'MONTH Month month MON Mon mon MM mm Mm mM');

expectedRows.value: SEPTEMBER September september SEP Sep sep 09 09 Mm mM

assertions.query: SELECT to_char(timestamp '2021-09-15 21:43:56.123456789', 'DAY Day day DDD ddd DY Dy dy DD dd D d');

expectedRows.value: WEDNESDAY Wednesday wednesday 258 258 WED Wed wed 15 15 4 4

assertions.query: SELECT to_char(timestamp '2021-09-15 21:43:56.123456789', 'DAY Day day DDD ddd DY Dy dy DD dd D d');

expectedRows.value: WEDNESDAY Wednesday wednesday 258 258 WED Wed wed 15 15 4 4

assertions.query: SELECT to_char(timestamp '2021-09-15 21:43:56.123456789', 'AM PM am pm A.M. P.M. a.m. p.m.');

expectedRows.value: PM PM pm pm P.M. P.M. p.m. p.m.

SELECT to_char(d1, 'DAY Day day DY Dy dy MONTH Month month RM MON Mon mon') FROM TIMESTAMP_TBL;

expectedRows.value: MONDAY    Monday    monday    MON Mon mon FEBRUARY  February  february  II   FEB Feb feb
